news.title: Rupee gains as oil retreat soothes, inflow expectations erode weakening bias
news.description: The Indian Rupee strengthened on Tuesday due to falling oil prices. Regulatory measures are expected to reduce India's balance of payments deficit. Asian currencies also saw gains. Brent crude prices dropped after Iran and Israel halted attacks. Elevated oil prices pose risks to India's economy.
